issue: Mixed responsibilities: data fetching, normalization, UI; lacks error boundaries and accessibility
suggested_changes: Split data fetching into hook, extract slot UI, add loading/error states, keyboard support

issue: Normalization logic duplicated; timezone handling fragile
suggested_changes: Move normalization to util, add tests, clarify timezone behavior

issue: No keyboard accessibility, missing aria attributes
suggested_changes: Extract SlotButton, add aria-pressed/role, keyboard handlers

issue: Uses window.confirm/alert; lacks optimistic UI handling
suggested_changes: Replace modals with consistent UI; show retries and inline errors

issue: Client-side filtering on large datasets; potential perf issues
suggested_changes: Add server-side filters/pagination or virtualized list

issue: Loads many datasets; single page responsibilities heavy
suggested_changes: Lazy-load panels, add skeleton loaders, memoize heavy computations

issue: No theme tokens defined; extend empty
suggested_changes: Add color/token scales, font, spacing, and component classes

issue: Minimal input validation, brittle payment verification error handling
suggested_changes: Add typed runtime validation, clearer 4xx messages, robust payment error handling

issue: Concurrency risk when booking slots; needs transaction or locking
suggested_changes: Use MongoDB transactions or optimistic locking, add integration tests

issue: External call handling needs timeouts and retries
suggested_changes: Add timeout/retry, circuit breaker, idempotency keys

issue: Missing compound indexes for frequent queries
suggested_changes: Add index on `{ shopId:1, slotStart:1 }`; add index for `userId` queries

issue: Verify `active` and timezone fields exist; add validation
suggested_changes: Add explicit schema fields and indexes

issue: Payouts need idempotency and audit logging
suggested_changes: Add idempotency token, record actions in AuditLog

issue: Large queries; paginate and optimize
suggested_changes: Add query limits and server-side aggregation

issue: Modal lacks focus-trap and accessible close controls
suggested_changes: Use Headless UI Dialog or Radix for accessible modal

issue: Auth state can be improved for clearer refresh/expiry flows
suggested_changes: Centralize token refresh, handle edge-cases for expired sessions

issue: Mass-cancellation may not be atomic; lacks notification confirmations
suggested_changes: Perform batch updates with retry and audit trail

issue: Clickable entire card but lacks accessible role/keyboard handling
suggested_changes: Add role=button, tabIndex, and keyboard handlers

issue: Expose debounced fetch and cancellation for inflight requests
suggested_changes: Return loading/error and cancel token support

issue: Ensure request validation middleware present on critical endpoints
suggested_changes: Add validate.middleware for body/params where missing

issue: Ensure unique constraints on phone/email and index on role
suggested_changes: Add unique indexes and data hygiene scripts

issue: Long-running job; add error handling and partial-failure retries
suggested_changes: Break into idempotent chunks and add logging

issue: Confirmation flow uses navigation state; resilient deep-linking needed
suggested_changes: Support restoring state from server or query params

issue: Selection UX could be more compact and keyboard accessible
suggested_changes: Use checkboxes with accessible labels and total summary
